user.title: Origin type
user.description:
Choose how the **origin** is determined.

- **Fixed coordinates**: enter longitude/latitude in the next step.
- **Device / person tracking**: pick a `device_tracker` or `person` entity in the next step; the integration will read its GPS on each scheduled update.

**Destination** is always a fixed coordinate (next step).

📅 Auto update: peak 07:00–09:00 every {peak_interval} min, otherwise every {normal_interval} min.

route.title: Route & API

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API Key, please check and retry
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Amap server, check your network
error.api_error: Amap API returned an error, check your parameters
error.invalid_entity: Select a device_tracker or person entity

init.title: Update commute route
init.description:
Change origin type, coordinates, or entity. The API Key cannot be changed here (remove and re-add the integration to change it).

📅 Auto update: peak 07:00–09:00 every {peak_interval} min, otherwise every {normal_interval} min.

error.invalid_entity: Select a device_tracker or person entity
